instruction: Write a FreeMarker page template that includes a shared partial `partials/header.ftl` at the top and `partials/footer.ftl` at the bottom, with main content between them in a `<main>` element.
code:
<#-- Page layout using static includes --> <#include "partials/header.ftl">

${pageTitle?html}

<#if bodyHtml??> ${bodyHtml}
<#include "partials/footer.ftl">
